title: RareSight
description: Spot rare Mobs instantly while breading mooshroom, axolotl or pandas
body:
1. Gives all axolotl variants(pink, yellow, brown, white) a white color so you can see the blue ones better
2. Gives red mooshrooms a white color so you can see the brown ones better
3. Gives all the panda variants their unique colors(normal=white, aggressive=red, brown=brown, lazy=light blue, playful=orange, weak=green, worried=orange)
